title: Admin console
subtitle: Manage platform users, team spaces, account security, and usage data.

overviewCards.users: Manage users, space access, roles, and security.
overviewCards.resources: Review and govern every demo resource on the platform.

users.title: User management
users.subtitle: Manage platform accounts, space access, and resource usage.

resource.title: Resource management
resource.subtitle: Review, filter, and govern demo resources across every space.
resource.deleteConfirm: Delete “{{title}}”? Its published revisions, share links, and analytics data will also become unavailable.

organizations.title: Team spaces
organizations.subtitle: Manage team spaces, members, and invitations.
organizations.teamSubtitle: Invite members and configure their access.

audit.title: Audit log
audit.subtitle: Track sensitive platform operations, actors, and change times.

recycle.title: Recycle bin
recycle.subtitle: Deleted content is retained for 30 days and can be restored or permanently removed.
recycle.purgeConfirm: Permanently delete “{{title}}”? This cannot be undone.

detail.title: User details
detail.subtitle: Account profile, permissions, and resource usage
detail.accountHelp: Update the user's profile, platform permissions, and interface preferences.
detail.name: Display name
detail.usageHelp: Review this user's content footprint and audience activity across the platform.
detail.selfProtection: Your own role and status cannot be changed here to prevent an administrator lockout.

teams.title: Team space associations
teams.description: Review and manage this user's team spaces, team roles, and current space.
teams.allLinked: This user is already associated with every team space.
teams.platformRoleNote: Platform and team roles are independent. Platform administrators can manage every team space without becoming team members.

spaces.title: Team space management
spaces.subtitle: Manage team spaces, owners, members, resources, and lifecycle in one place.
spaces.createHelp: Create an isolated collaboration space and assign its first owner. Platform administrators are not added automatically.
spaces.name: Space name
spaces.selectDescription: Choose Manage space to review members, resources, and settings.
spaces.ownershipDescription: The owner controls space settings, member permissions, and archiving.
spaces.basicSettingsDescription: Renaming does not change the stable identifier or existing resource links.
spaces.archiveDescription: Archiving blocks edits, revokes public shares, and retains the space in the recycle bin for 30 days.
spaces.archiveConfirm: Archive “{{name}}”? All public shares will be revoked immediately.

security.title: Security actions
security.description: Manage sign-in credentials, sessions, and the account lifecycle.
security.resetHelp: Setting a new password immediately revokes all of this user's active sessions.
security.resetDone: Password reset. The user must sign in again.
security.selfResetHint: Use Personal settings to change the current administrator password.
security.deleteHint: The user will be disabled and moved to the recycle bin, and all sessions will be revoked immediately.
security.deleteConfirm: Delete {{name}}? This user's resources and data will also be deleted.

selectUser: Select a user from the list to view details.
